## [00:00 - 01:33]

This is the Pubcast Shot. I'm John Loomer. And today we're going to talk about the metrics that you should care about. Let's go. Stop worrying about that Facebook ads metric. Meta gives you a whole bunch of metrics to distract you with. Be careful. There are primary metrics that you should care about. After that, all other metrics are secondary and tertiary. I mainly just like saying tertiary. Secondary and tertiary metrics are interesting, but they really only provide some perspective. Do not obsess over them. Your primary metrics are simple. The number of desired actions that you optimize for, and the cost per desired action. That's it. Nothing else is all that important. Not CPM, not CTR, and certainly not cost per click. Advertisers are often fooled into believing that if you improve these, you'll improve your cost per desired action too. This is rarely the case. I like to add columns for a bunch of metrics that I watch, but that's mostly for entertainment purposes. My focus is truly on those two columns. Desired actions and cost per desired action. Yours should be too. Simplify what you care about and life will be a whole lot easier. Last call. So this shot was taken directly from a video I did on TikTok. If you're not already following me on TikTok, do so at John Loomer. Don't forget to subscribe, rate, and review. Until next time, do awesome things. I'm out.
